gaps: CourtListener MCP server was down (REDIS_URL not set in its session store); a health check or fallback read-only REST path would keep cells from losing their main retrieval surface
fedcourts query has no keyword/kind filter, so a mandamus petition cannot be matched to mandamus priors — the ca11 cut returns generic historical merits cases
statpack has no per-event-kind cut (e.g. mandamus petitions by disposition) analogous to the modern discretionary-cert cut
helpful: metrics/statpack.md as a committed, always-available base-rate source
web search as a fallback when the MCP server is down
notes: Forward-mode pro se mandamus cell. The provisioned snapshot had only the two opening docket entries; with the MCP server down, one scoped web search on the underlying district case supplied the decisive context.
